findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 42 findings from 7 agents into 35 unique findings. Removed 7 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): PushFlow's Strong Delivery Metrics (score=4.952); North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=4.68); Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.464); Primary KPI: Unsubscribe Rate (score=3.464); Gather User Feedback on Notification Preferences (score=3.381)

top_priorities.title: Gather User Feedback on Notification Preferences

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. intake-001 vs requirements-007: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need to address accessibility concerns, which may require additional user data collection.; feasibility-002 vs requirements-002: Push notification delivery failures on Android 14 pose a critical risk, while fixing this issue is a critical requirement.; competitive-003 vs risk-003: SmartNotify's lower pricing could lead to perceptions of lower quality, which conflicts with the need to communicate value effectively.

evidence.excerpt: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need to address accessibility concerns, which may require additional user data collection.
Push notification delivery failures on Android 14 pose a critical risk, while fixing this issue is a critical requirement.
SmartNotify's lower pricing could lead to perceptions of lower quality, which conflicts with the need to communicate value effectively.

conflicts.description: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need to address accessibility concerns, which may require additional user data collection.
conflicts.resolution: Ensure that any data collection for accessibility improvements is compliant with privacy regulations and minimizes PII collection.
conflicts.reasoning: Balancing privacy and accessibility is crucial; improvements can be made while adhering to privacy standards.

conflicts.description: Push notification delivery failures on Android 14 pose a critical risk, while fixing this issue is a critical requirement.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize immediate fixes for Android 14 delivery issues to mitigate risks and ensure user engagement.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the delivery failure is essential to maintain user satisfaction and engagement, aligning with critical requirements.

conflicts.description: SmartNotify's lower pricing could lead to perceptions of lower quality, which conflicts with the need to communicate value effectively.
conflicts.resolution: Develop a marketing strategy that emphasizes the quality and value of SmartNotify's offerings despite lower pricing.
conflicts.reasoning: Effective communication can mitigate risks associated with pricing perceptions while maintaining competitive advantages.

summary: Consolidated 42 findings into 35 unique items. Removed 7 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: PushFlow's Strong Delivery Metrics.
